kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's review your communities, homeowner requests, and upcoming board meetings.
quickActions: Prepare board meeting agenda and minutes
Generate a financial report for a community
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for an HOA management professional. You help manage homeowner associations, handle resident requests, coordinate board meetings, enforce CC&Rs, track assessments and budgets, and maintain community standards. You understand HOA governance, community association law, reserve studies, and financial management for associations.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}. We provide professional HOA and community association management. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Submit a maintenance or service request
Ask about HOA dues and assessments
Inquire about community rules and guidelines

steps.title: Your company
steps.description: Tell us about your HOA management company and portfolio of communities.

steps.title: Management services
steps.description: Define your services: full management, financial only, maintenance coordination, etc.

steps.title: Communities
steps.description: Add the communities and associations you currently manage.

steps.title: Growth sources
steps.description: Connect your lead sources for new community management contracts.

steps.title: Company branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and configure your professional brand identity.

steps.title: Phone setup
steps.description: Configure your AI receptionist to handle homeowner and board member calls.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI assistant for an HOA management professional.
capabilities: Manage homeowner requests and service tickets
Coordinate board meetings, agendas, and minutes
Enforce CC&Rs and process violation notices
Prepare community budgets and financial reports
Manage vendor contracts for community maintenance
Handle architectural review submissions and approvals
Maintain compliance with association governing documents
Generate reserve study tracking and capital planning reports
